category_sources: source_facts.description says the CLI updates and uses Solo 2 security keys; official SoloKeys GitHub README describes Solo 2 device modes and firmware operations.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is solo2-cli; official GitHub repository is solokeys/solo2-cli.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides CLI usage; repository metadata links docs.rs/solo2 for Rust API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/solokeys/solo2-cli; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe Solo 2 security-key administration, bootloader, firmware, and CLI use.
